title: Banking and financial statistics
summary: This is a thin crawl seed record for the Bank of Canada 'Banking and financial statistics' page. The actual page content is not present in this record; only metadata indicating that the page contains month-end statements of assets and liabilities as required by the Bank of Canada Act. The figures for the last two reference periods are noted as preliminary and subject to revision.
key_points: This is a metadata/crawl seed record, not actual source content
The page would contain Bank of Canada assets and liabilities at month-end (formerly B1)
Content is governed by the Bank of Canada Act requirements
Last two reference period figures are preliminary and subject to revision
No actual balance sheet figures or data are included in this record
why_it_matters: This record does not contain usable research content. It is only a crawl seed indicating that the Bank of Canada publishes monthly balance sheet data. To extract macro-catalyst-relevant information, one would need to access the actual data tables rather than this metadata record.

issues_found: Source is a thin metadata/crawl seed record with no actual research content
Source is a container/index page (seed_crawl), not an article or data page
No macro catalyst or market structure information present
event_type set to 'unknown' which is technically valid but indicates no actual event was captured
No published_at date provided in metadata
Record accurately self-identifies as having no content worth archiving

human_review.notes: The record is self-evidently a thin metadata seed with no actual content. Both the generated record and source clearly indicate this is not archiveable material. No judgment call is needed.

notes: Non-archiveable. This seed_crawl record is a thin metadata record that does not contain the actual banking and financial statistics data. It only indicates that the Bank of Canada publishes month-end balance sheet data. The source name in the template was incorrectly set to 'macro catalysts' (matching TARGET) instead of 'Bank of Canada'. The page_type of 'seed_crawl' suggests an internal crawl classification rather than an actual source type. Recommend re-crawling to capture actual data tables if macro catalyst analysis of Bank of Canada balance sheet is desired.
